fix: restore NPM_TOKEN auth — provenance is attestation, not authentication

Keep --provenance for supply chain security, restore NODE_AUTH_TOKEN.

commit.message:
fix(poe): parse poe: events inside ```json code fences

Agents (e.g. claude -p) wrap their structured JSON output in ```json
code blocks. The fence-tracking guard was skipping those lines, so
poe:decision events never reached handle_poe_decision and nothing
appeared in the queue.

Fix: only skip the fence delimiter lines themselves (``` / ```json);
always attempt poe: event parsing for content lines, regardless of
whether we're inside a fence.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: look up fiatDecimalPlaces from wallet cache instead of hardcoding 2

BuyModal and SellModal now derive the fiat field's decimal limit from the
cached wallets list (wallets.find(w => w.currency === fiatCurrency)?.decimalPlaces)
instead of assuming 2. This correctly handles any fiat currency regardless
of its decimal places (e.g. JPY = 0, BHD = 3).

Add CLI UX improvements: uninstall, verify, list, verbose

New commands:
- --uninstall: clean removal from both ~/.claude/ and ./.claude/
- --verify: check installation integrity, report missing files
- --list: show all installed commands and knowledge files
- --verbose: debug output for troubleshooting

Improvements:
- Refactor 3 duplicate install blocks into single installTo() function
- Extract hardcoded paths into constants (COMMANDS_DIR, KNOWLEDGE_DIR, etc.)
- Single COMMANDS array as source of truth for names and descriptions
- Expanded --help with full command descriptions
- Scanner now detects Gradle, pyproject.toml, setup.py, Vitest, Supertest
- Added __tests__ to test directory scan list

fix: prevent float balances

like 20.2 that SQLite stored as REAL instead of INTEGER. Fixed to use

net against any future float slipping through.

commit.message:
feat: v0.49.0 — autonomous strategy change for agents (§12 層3)

Add POST /agents/{id}/change-strategy endpoint enabling agents to
autonomously escalate from single to parallel or competitive execution
when they determine a task is too complex to handle alone.

New features:
- ChangeStrategyRequest Pydantic model (pattern: single|parallel|competitive,
  count: 1-10, tags, context, reply_to)
- POST /agents/{agent_id}/change-strategy REST endpoint: accepts strategy
  change request, spawns count parallel tasks when context is provided,
  returns accepted with spawned_task_ids list
- /change-strategy slash command (.claude/commands/change-strategy.md):
  syntax /change-strategy parallel:2 <task context>
- examples/autonomous_strategy_config.yaml: 3-agent demo config

Tests: 17 new in tests/test_change_strategy.py (1043 → 1060 total)
Demo: 41/41 checks PASSED with real ClaudeCodeAgent instances

Design: §12 層3 実行方式の自律切り替え; arXiv:2505.19591 (Evolving
Orchestration), ALAS arXiv:2505.12501 (adaptive execution escalation)
